productDisplayName: Jockey ELANCE Men Black Y Front Briefs 1006
description: Style Note Revel in the comfort of soft fabric with this hip brief from jockey. The superior fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered fly construction offers maximum support. Product Details Black hip brief, soft fabric with Magic Rib for optimum comfort, signature and original Jockey Y front fly opening, styled for optimum support and UltraSoft waistband that provides super soft, smooth and comfortable grip with branding Material and Care 100% combed cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Tumble dry low
